obligations.text: Register map, word access, CSR/CALIB field layout, and reserved-bit policy match DDI0403 B3.3.
obligations.trigger: a SysTick register access, clock edge, or reset event in this group's scope
obligations.guarantee: CSR/RVR/CVR are RW and CALIB is RO at 0xE000E010/14/18/1C; CSR fields and CALIB fields sit at their architectural bit positions; reserved bits are RAZ/WI.
obligations.observable: EVT_SYST_REGMAP scoreboard rows over CSR/CVR reads, COUNTFLAG, counter, and tick request

obligations.text: Enabled 24-bit counter decrements once per processor clock and wraps via RVR reload.
obligations.trigger: a SysTick register access, clock edge, or reset event in this group's scope
obligations.guarantee: While ENABLE=1 the counter decrements by 1 each clock; on reaching 0 it reloads RVR on the next clock; ENABLE=0 freezes counting.
obligations.observable: EVT_SYST_COUNT scoreboard rows over CSR/CVR reads, COUNTFLAG, counter, and tick request

obligations.text: Wrap period equals RELOAD+1 clocks with value 0 visible for exactly one cycle.
obligations.trigger: a SysTick register access, clock edge, or reset event in this group's scope
obligations.guarantee: Consecutive 1->0 wrap events are exactly (RELOAD+1) clocks apart; CURRENT=0 is observable for exactly one cycle before reload.
obligations.observable: EVT_SYST_PERIOD scoreboard rows over CSR/CVR reads, COUNTFLAG, counter, and tick request

obligations.text: RVR is a staging reload value that applies at the next wrap, not immediately.
obligations.trigger: a SysTick register access, clock edge, or reset event in this group's scope
obligations.guarantee: Writing SYST_RVR updates RELOAD without reloading CVR; the new value loads only at the next wrap.
obligations.observable: EVT_SYST_RELOAD scoreboard rows over CSR/CVR reads, COUNTFLAG, counter, and tick request

obligations.text: RELOAD=0 is legal and inert: counter holds 0 and produces no further events.
obligations.trigger: a SysTick register access, clock edge, or reset event in this group's scope
obligations.guarantee: After the next wrap with RELOAD=0 the counter loads 0 and holds 0, producing no 1->0 event; it never wraps to 0xFFFFFF.
obligations.observable: EVT_SYST_RELOAD_ZERO scoreboard rows over CSR/CVR reads, COUNTFLAG, counter, and tick request

obligations.text: CVR read returns live count; any CVR write clears CVR and COUNTFLAG without an exception, reloading next clock.
obligations.trigger: a SysTick register access, clock edge, or reset event in this group's scope
obligations.guarantee: A CVR read returns the live count; any CVR write clears CURRENT and COUNTFLAG, ignores data, pends no exception, and reloads RVR on the next enabled clock.
obligations.observable: EVT_SYST_CVR scoreboard rows over CSR/CVR reads, COUNTFLAG, counter, and tick request

obligations.text: COUNTFLAG sets on 1->0 and clears only on a functional CSR read or any CVR write.
obligations.trigger: a SysTick register access, clock edge, or reset event in this group's scope
obligations.guarantee: COUNTFLAG[16] sets on the 1->0 transition; it clears on a functional SYST_CSR read or any SYST_CVR write; CSR and RVR writes do not clear it.
obligations.observable: EVT_SYST_COUNTFLAG scoreboard rows over CSR/CVR reads, COUNTFLAG, counter, and tick request

obligations.text: A qualified set-pending pulse is emitted on a natural 1->0 wrap when TICKINT=1, never for a CVR write.
obligations.trigger: a SysTick register access, clock edge, or reset event in this group's scope
obligations.guarantee: The IP asserts a single-cycle tick set-pending request when a natural 1->0 transition occurs AND TICKINT=1; it never asserts it for a CVR-write-to-zero or when TICKINT=0.
obligations.observable: EVT_SYST_TICKINT scoreboard rows over CSR/CVR reads, COUNTFLAG, counter, and tick request

obligations.text: With NOREF=1 (v1), CLKSOURCE is forced to processor clock and unclearable.
obligations.trigger: a SysTick register access, clock edge, or reset event in this group's scope
obligations.guarantee: When NOREF=1, SYST_CSR.CLKSOURCE reads as 1 and writes of 0 are ignored, keeping the processor clock as the only tick source.
obligations.observable: EVT_SYST_CLKSOURCE scoreboard rows over CSR/CVR reads, COUNTFLAG, counter, and tick request

obligations.text: After async-assert/sync-deassert reset SYST_CSR=0x00000000 and the init sequence starts counting from RELOAD.
obligations.trigger: a SysTick register access, clock edge, or reset event in this group's scope
obligations.guarantee: After reset deassertion SYST_CSR=0x00000000 (ENABLE/TICKINT/COUNTFLAG=0, CLKSOURCE=1 under NOREF=1); the write-RVR/write-CVR/set-ENABLE sequence makes counting start from RELOAD.
obligations.observable: EVT_SYST_RESET scoreboard rows over CSR/CVR reads, COUNTFLAG, counter, and tick request

obligations.text: Disable freezes CVR and retains COUNTFLAG with no spurious reload on re-enable.
obligations.trigger: a SysTick register access, clock edge, or reset event in this group's scope
obligations.guarantee: Clearing ENABLE freezes CURRENT and leaves COUNTFLAG unchanged; re-enabling resumes from the held value with a reload only on wrap-through-0 or after a CVR write.
obligations.observable: EVT_SYST_DISABLE scoreboard rows over CSR/CVR reads, COUNTFLAG, counter, and tick request

obligations.text: Only the qualified tick request crosses the boundary; SCB pending/priority and debug-halt are out of scope.
obligations.trigger: a SysTick register access, clock edge, or reset event in this group's scope
obligations.guarantee: The IP's only exception-related output is the qualified tick request; it drives no ICSR pending/priority/vector state, and the counter has no debug-halt qualifier in v1 (explicit environment assumption).
obligations.observable: EVT_SYST_BOUNDARY scoreboard rows over CSR/CVR reads, COUNTFLAG, counter, and tick request

assume.env: Host issues 32-bit word-aligned APB-lite accesses to the SysTick window.

guarantee.dut: CSR/RVR/CVR are RW and CALIB is RO at 0xE000E010/14/18/1C; CSR fields and CALIB fields sit at their architectural bit positions; reserved bits are RAZ/WI.

contracts.pass_condition: scoreboard_rows.v1 rows show observed equals behavior_model.syst.regmap for every SCN_SYST_REGMAP row, zero failed rows
contracts.implementation_policy: TB language and simulator are not fixed by this contract

assume.env: ENABLE and RELOAD are programmed; processor clock runs.

guarantee.dut: While ENABLE=1 the counter decrements by 1 each clock; on reaching 0 it reloads RVR on the next clock; ENABLE=0 freezes counting.

contracts.pass_condition: scoreboard_rows.v1 rows show observed equals behavior_model.syst.count for every SCN_SYST_COUNT row, zero failed rows
contracts.implementation_policy: TB language and simulator are not fixed by this contract

assume.env: ENABLE=1 and RELOAD=N-1 with N>=1, stable.

guarantee.dut: Consecutive 1->0 wrap events are exactly (RELOAD+1) clocks apart; CURRENT=0 is observable for exactly one cycle before reload.

contracts.pass_condition: scoreboard_rows.v1 rows show observed equals cycle_rules.syst.period for every SCN_SYST_PERIOD row, zero failed rows
contracts.implementation_policy: TB language and simulator are not fixed by this contract

assume.env: Counter is running with a prior RELOAD.

guarantee.dut: Writing SYST_RVR updates RELOAD without reloading CVR; the new value loads only at the next wrap.

contracts.pass_condition: scoreboard_rows.v1 rows show observed equals behavior_model.syst.reload for every SCN_SYST_RELOAD row, zero failed rows
contracts.implementation_policy: TB language and simulator are not fixed by this contract

guarantee.dut: After the next wrap with RELOAD=0 the counter loads 0 and holds 0, producing no 1->0 event; it never wraps to 0xFFFFFF.

contracts.pass_condition: scoreboard_rows.v1 rows show observed equals behavior_model.syst.reload_zero for every SCN_SYST_RELOAD_ZERO row, zero failed rows
contracts.implementation_policy: TB language and simulator are not fixed by this contract

assume.env: Host may read or write SYST_CVR at any time.

guarantee.dut: A CVR read returns the live count; any CVR write clears CURRENT and COUNTFLAG, ignores data, pends no exception, and reloads RVR on the next enabled clock.

contracts.pass_condition: scoreboard_rows.v1 rows show observed equals behavior_model.syst.cvr for every SCN_SYST_CVR row, zero failed rows
contracts.implementation_policy: TB language and simulator are not fixed by this contract

assume.env: v1 has no debug interface: all CSR reads are functional reads.

guarantee.dut: COUNTFLAG[16] sets on the 1->0 transition; it clears on a functional SYST_CSR read or any SYST_CVR write; CSR and RVR writes do not clear it.

contracts.pass_condition: scoreboard_rows.v1 rows show observed equals behavior_model.syst.countflag for every SCN_SYST_COUNTFLAG row, zero failed rows
contracts.implementation_policy: TB language and simulator are not fixed by this contract

assume.env: TICKINT programmed; SCB consumes the request and owns the pending latch.

guarantee.dut: The IP asserts a single-cycle tick set-pending request when a natural 1->0 transition occurs AND TICKINT=1; it never asserts it for a CVR-write-to-zero or when TICKINT=0.

contracts.pass_condition: scoreboard_rows.v1 rows show observed equals behavior_model.syst.tickint for every SCN_SYST_TICKINT row, zero failed rows
contracts.implementation_policy: TB language and simulator are not fixed by this contract

guarantee.dut: When NOREF=1, SYST_CSR.CLKSOURCE reads as 1 and writes of 0 are ignored, keeping the processor clock as the only tick source.

contracts.pass_condition: scoreboard_rows.v1 rows show observed equals behavior_model.syst.clksource for every SCN_SYST_CLKSOURCE row, zero failed rows
contracts.implementation_policy: TB language and simulator are not fixed by this contract

assume.env: Reset is asserted asynchronously and deasserted synchronously to the processor clock.

guarantee.dut: After reset deassertion SYST_CSR=0x00000000 (ENABLE/TICKINT/COUNTFLAG=0, CLKSOURCE=1 under NOREF=1); the write-RVR/write-CVR/set-ENABLE sequence makes counting start from RELOAD.

contracts.pass_condition: scoreboard_rows.v1 rows show observed equals behavior_model.syst.reset for every SCN_SYST_RESET row, zero failed rows
contracts.implementation_policy: TB language and simulator are not fixed by this contract

assume.env: Counter holds a non-zero value when ENABLE is cleared.

guarantee.dut: Clearing ENABLE freezes CURRENT and leaves COUNTFLAG unchanged; re-enabling resumes from the held value with a reload only on wrap-through-0 or after a CVR write.

contracts.pass_condition: scoreboard_rows.v1 rows show observed equals behavior_model.syst.disable for every SCN_SYST_DISABLE row, zero failed rows
contracts.implementation_policy: TB language and simulator are not fixed by this contract

assume.env: SCB/NVIC own the pending latch, priority, and vectoring; v1 has no debug interface.

guarantee.dut: The IP's only exception-related output is the qualified tick request; it drives no ICSR pending/priority/vector state, and the counter has no debug-halt qualifier in v1 (explicit environment assumption).

contracts.pass_condition: scoreboard_rows.v1 rows show observed equals behavior_model.syst.boundary for every SCN_SYST_BOUNDARY row, zero failed rows
contracts.implementation_policy: TB language and simulator are not fixed by this contract

execution_policy.notes: Signoff requires oag.check and oag.decide; authoring packets are work inputs, not closure decisions.
